questions.question: The area of the triangle formed by the tangent to the curve xy = a² at the point (x₁, y₁) and the coordinate axes is ______.

options.A: x cos θ + y sin θ = r
options.B: x sin θ + y cos θ = r
options.C: x cos θ - y sin θ = r
